advancements.cold_sweat.chameleon_find_b: Follow a chameleon's tail to find a new biome
advancements.cold_sweat.extreme_temps.de: Find a place that's too hot or cold to survive
Wear a suit of fully insulated armor
advancements.cold_sweat.get_soul_lamp.de: Using a Heart of the Sea, craft a Soulspring Lamp, a vital tool against the Nether's inferno
advancements.cold_sweat.huddle_close.des: Stand next to a block to warm up
advancements.cold_sweat.insulate_armor.d: Insulate a piece of armor to protect yourself from the elements
advancements.cold_sweat.last_resort.desc: Set yourself on fire to prevent freezing to death
advancements.cold_sweat.lava_sea.descrip: Stand next to a sea of lava
advancements.cold_sweat.lava_sea.title: The Pit of Fire
advancements.cold_sweat.place_hearth.des: Use a hearth to stay safe in your base
advancements.cold_sweat.root.description: Keep warm and you'll be fine
advancements.cold_sweat.root.title: Cold Sweat
advancements.cold_sweat.soul_lamp_fuel.d: Fuel the soulspring lamp by clicking it with fuel in your inventory
advancements.cold_sweat.tame_chameleon.d: Tame a chameleon. They're useful for exploration and double as a hat
advancements.cold_sweat.use_smokestack.d: Put a smokestack on a boiler or icebox to make an area more livable
attribute.burning_point.desc: The player's maximum habitable world temperature
attribute.cold_dampening.desc: Slows the rate at which the player freezes (negative values accelerate it)
attribute.cold_resistance.desc: A multiplier applied to freezing damage and effects (1 means fully resistant)
attribute.freezing_point.desc: The player's minimum habitable world temperature
attribute.heat_dampening.desc: Slows the rate at which the player overheats (negative values accelerate it)
attribute.heat_resistance.desc: A multiplier applied to burning damage and effects (1 means fully resistant)
cold_sweat.config.animate_soulspring_lam: Uses a custom animated model for the soulspring lamp. Disable if there are visual issues.
cold_sweat.config.celsius.name: Celsius
cold_sweat.config.check_sleep_conditions: Prevents the player from sleeping if they are overheating, freezing, or in an inhospitable area.
cold_sweat.config.clientside_warning: Clientside only. This has no affect on gameplay.
cold_sweat.config.cold_freezing_hearts.d: Controls how much of the player's hearts freeze over when cold, preventing them from regenerating.
cold_sweat.config.cold_knockback_reducti: Reduces the knockback of the player's attacks when their body temperature is cold.
cold_sweat.config.cold_mining_impairment: Decreases the player's mining speed when their body temperature is cold.
cold_sweat.config.cold_movement_slowdown: Slows the player's movement speed when their body temperature is cold.
cold_sweat.config.config_button_pos.desc: Open the options menu with controls for repositioning the config button.
cold_sweat.config.config_button_pos.name: Reposition Config Button...
cold_sweat.config.custom_hotbar.desc: Enables Cold Sweat's custom hotbar layout (disable this if it is clashing with other mods).
cold_sweat.config.custom_hotbar.name: Custom Hotbar
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.custom.name: Custom
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.desc: Change the difficulty of Cold Sweat.
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.description: Fire and Ice resistance potions are %ddisabled%d
Fire and Ice resistance potions are %denabled%d
Body temperature change rate is reduced by %d
Body temperature change rate is increased by %d
Body temperature change rate is normal
World temperature %dis not%d visible without a thermometer
World temperature %dis%d visible without a thermometer
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.easy.name: Easy
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.hard.name: Hard
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.name: Difficulty
cold_sweat.config.difficulty.normal.name: Normal
cold_sweat.config.distortion.desc: Enables screen distortion, shaking, and swaying effects.
cold_sweat.config.distortion.name: Distortion Effects
cold_sweat.config.fahrenheit.name: Fahrenheit
cold_sweat.config.fire_resistance.desc: Whether Fire Resistance potions will give the player immunity to burning damage.
cold_sweat.config.fire_resistance.name: Fire Resistance
The position of food effects on the screen.
cold_sweat.config.freeze_overlay_opacity: The opacity of the icy overlay that appears when the player is freezing (does not affect Vanilla's powder snow overlay).
cold_sweat.config.grace_period.desc: Gives the player a brief time of immunity to temperature when spawning in the world.
cold_sweat.config.grace_period.name: Grace Period
cold_sweat.config.grace_period_length.de: The duration of the Grace Period, in ticks.
cold_sweat.config.heat_blur_amount.desc: The amount of blur applied to the screen when the player is overheating.
cold_sweat.config.heat_blur_amount.name: Heat Blur Strength
cold_sweat.config.heat_border_opacity.de: The opacity of the pulsing red border around the screen when the player is overheating.
cold_sweat.config.heat_fog_distance.desc: The distance at which heatstroke fog will appear when the player is overheating.
cold_sweat.config.heat_fog_distance.name: Heat Fog Distance
cold_sweat.config.heat_sway_amount.desc: The intensity of the camera sway effect when the player is overheating.
cold_sweat.config.heat_sway_amount.name: Heat Sway Amount
cold_sweat.config.heat_sway_speed.desc: The speed of the camera sway effect when the player is overheating.
cold_sweat.config.heat_sway_speed.name: Heat Sway Speed
cold_sweat.config.high_contrast.desc: Enables a high-contrast UI scheme for better readability.
cold_sweat.config.high_contrast.name: High Contrast
cold_sweat.config.ice_resistance.desc: Whether Ice Resistance potions will give the player immunity to freezing damage.
cold_sweat.config.ice_resistance.name: Ice Resistance
cold_sweat.config.icon_bobbing.desc: Whether elements of Cold Sweat's UI should shake in extreme temperatures.
cold_sweat.config.icon_bobbing.name: Icon Bobbing
cold_sweat.config.insulation_strength.de: A multiplier determining the effectiveness of all insulation.
cold_sweat.config.max_temperature.desc: The maximum livable world temperature. Above this point, the player will start overheating.
cold_sweat.config.max_temperature.name: Max Temperature
cold_sweat.config.min_temperature.desc: The minimum livable world temperature. Below this point, the player will start freezing.
cold_sweat.config.min_temperature.name: Min Temperature
cold_sweat.config.modifier_tick_rate.des: The rate at which temperature calculations are performed for entities.
cold_sweat.config.move_body_icon.desc: Moves the body temperature icon to make way for the advanced readout when the player has a thermometer.
cold_sweat.config.move_body_icon.name: Dynamic Temp. Icon
cold_sweat.config.offset_shift.name: Hold 'SHIFT' to move 10 pixels; 'CTRL'+'SHIFT' for 100 pixels
cold_sweat.config.require_thermometer.de: Require players to have a thermometer to see the world's temperature.
cold_sweat.config.shiver_intensity.desc: The intensity of the shivering effect when the player is freezing.
cold_sweat.config.shiver_intensity.name: Shiver Intensity
cold_sweat.config.show_frozen_health.des: Show frozen health overlayed on the health bar.
cold_sweat.config.show_water_effect.desc: Displays a water droplet effect on-screen and/or dripping water particles when the player is wet.
cold_sweat.config.show_water_effect.name: Water Effects
cold_sweat.config.smart_source.desc: Allows this block to automatically enable itself as needed if players are nearby. Requires manual redstone input otherwise.
cold_sweat.config.smart_source.name: Smart Mode (%s)
cold_sweat.config.source_debug.desc: Displays areas that thermal source blocks (hearth/boiler/icebox) are affecting when the F3 debug menu is open.
cold_sweat.config.source_debug.name: F3 Debug Visuals
cold_sweat.config.source_max_range.desc: The maximum distance that pipes can direct air away from this block.
cold_sweat.config.source_max_range.name: Max Range
cold_sweat.config.source_max_volume.desc: The maximum size of area that this block can affect, in blocks.
cold_sweat.config.source_max_volume.name: Max Volume
cold_sweat.config.source_range.desc: The range of this block's area of effect.
cold_sweat.config.source_range.name: Range
cold_sweat.config.source_warm_up_time.de: The time it takes for this block to reach full power, in ticks.
cold_sweat.config.temp_damage.desc: The amount of damage dealt when the player is freezing or overheating.
cold_sweat.config.temp_damage.name: Temp. Damage
cold_sweat.config.temp_damage_interval.d: How often, in ticks, the player takes temperature damage when freezing or overheating.
cold_sweat.config.temp_effects.desc: Adjust the effects of temperature on the player.
cold_sweat.config.temp_effects.name: Temperature Effects...
cold_sweat.config.temp_icon_location.des: The position of the body temperature icon on the screen.
cold_sweat.config.temp_offset.desc: Applies a visual offset to the world's temperature, to make it appear hotter or colder.
cold_sweat.config.temp_offset.name: Temp. Offset
The position of the body temperature readout (number) on the screen.
cold_sweat.config.temp_smoothing.desc: Visually smooths changing temperatures on the world temperature gauge.
cold_sweat.config.temp_smoothing.name: Temp. Smoothing
cold_sweat.config.temperature_rate.desc: Changes the rate at which the body temperature increases or decreases.
cold_sweat.config.temperature_rate.name: Rate Multiplier
cold_sweat.config.title: Cold Sweat Config
cold_sweat.config.units.desc: Displays temperature in Celsius or Fahrenheit.
cold_sweat.config.units.name: Units
cold_sweat.config.use_peaceful.desc: Disables negative temperature effects if the game is set to Peaceful mode.
cold_sweat.config.use_peaceful.name: Nullify in Peaceful
The opacity of the water droplets for the on-screen water effect.
cold_sweat.config.water_droplet_scale.de: The size of the water droplets for the on-screen water effect.
cold_sweat.config.world_temp_location.de: The position of the world temperature gauge on the screen.
cold_sweat.message.sleep.body.cold: You may not rest now; You are freezing.
cold_sweat.message.sleep.body.hot: You may not rest now; You are overheating.
cold_sweat.message.sleep.world.cold: You may not rest now; It is freezing here.
cold_sweat.message.sleep.world.hot: You may not rest now; It is sweltering here.
cold_sweat.units.celsius.name: Celsius
cold_sweat.units.fahrenheit.name: Fahrenheit
cold_sweat.units.minecraft.name: Minecraft Units
commands.cold_sweat.reload.failure: Failed to reload Cold Sweat configs: %s
commands.cold_sweat.temperature.clear.al: Cleared all temperature properties for %d entities
commands.cold_sweat.temperature.invalid: The selector includes entities that do not have temperature
commands.cold_sweat.temperature.modify.a: Added modifier to temperature property "%d" for %d entities
Added modifier to temperature property "%d" for %d
commands.cold_sweat.temperature.modify.s: Set temperature property "%d" for %d entities to %d
commands.cold_sweat.temperature.set.many: Set the %s temperature of %d entities to %d
effect.cold_sweat.frigidness.desc: Grants the player a cooling effect in hot environments. Higher levels have a stronger effect.
effect.cold_sweat.frigidness.description: Grants the player a cooling effect in hot environments. Higher levels have a stronger effect.
effect.cold_sweat.grace.desc: Grants immunity to temperature-based damage for a time after the player dies or first spawns.
effect.cold_sweat.grace.description: Grants immunity to temperature-based damage for a time after the player dies or first spawns.
effect.cold_sweat.ice_resistance.desc: Grants immunity to freezing damage and powder snow.
effect.cold_sweat.ice_resistance.descrip: Grants immunity to freezing damage and powder snow.
effect.cold_sweat.warmth.desc: Grants the player a warming effect in cold environments. Higher levels have a stronger effect.
effect.cold_sweat.warmth.description: Grants the player a warming effect in cold environments. Higher levels have a stronger effect.
message.cold_sweat.creative_warning_mess: Due to a Minecraft bug, entering the creative inventory on a server will delete insulation from your armor items!
tooltip.cold_sweat.config.must_be_in_gam: Must be in-game to edit configs
